div1.entryFree:
Bodily, adj., 1) concerning the body: in b. health, H4B II, 2, 111. some b. wound, Oth. II, 3, 267. the dearest b. part of your mistress, Cymb. I, 4, 162.
2) not only thought, but real: what (counsels) ever have been thought on in this state, that could be brought to b. act ere Rome had circumvention? Cor. I, 2, 5.
